## What problem does this solve?

Describe the knowledge management or workflow problem you're trying to fix.

## Proposed solution

Describe your idea. If it's a skill, sketch the trigger phrase and what Claude should do.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about?

## Additional context

Links to related skills, notes, or prior art.
